polymarket_summary.summary: Bullish: Overall market sentiment leans positive, primarily driven by economic stability expectations. A strong 93% of the market anticipates no change in Fed interest rates after July 2026, with only 7% expecting a hike. Geopolitical risks concerning US-Iran appear contained, as a U.S. invasion before 2027 is only priced at 27%, and Kharg Island's loss by July 31 at a mere 2%.
